item.title: About
item.description: Hi there! If you don’t know me, my name is Solomon Williams aka kansowi. I’m 18 years old and pursuing a bachelor’s degree in Computer Science and Information Technology at Reva University. I go by the twitter/instagram handle @kansowi. I’m interested in Machine Learning, Security Research, Penetration Testing and CTFs. I enjoy hacking stuff as much as I enjoy writing about it. So here you can find write-ups for CTF challenges, articles about certain topics and even quick notes about different things that I want to remember.
